name: Ice Maker Assembly
description: OEM ice maker assembly. Fits side-by-side and French door refrigerators. Includes ice maker module, tray, and mounting hardware.

name: Refrigerator Water Filter
description: OEM refrigerator water filter. Replaces EveryDrop EDR4RXD1. Fits many Whirlpool, Maytag, KitchenAid, and JennAir refrigerators.

name: Refrigerator Door Shelf Bar
description: OEM refrigerator door shelf bar, clear. Replaces broken or cracked door shelf retainers on many refrigerator models.

name: Refrigerator Temperature Control Thermostat
description: OEM refrigerator temperature control thermostat. Symptoms include refrigerator not cooling or freezing food.

name: Dishwasher Lower Spray Arm
description: OEM dishwasher lower spray arm. If your dishwasher is not cleaning dishes properly, a cracked or clogged spray arm may be the cause.

name: Dishwasher Door Latch Assembly
description: OEM dishwasher door latch assembly. Replaces door strike, handle, and micro switch. Fits many Whirlpool, Maytag, and KitchenAid dishwashers.

name: Dishwasher Detergent and Rinse Aid Dispenser
description: OEM dishwasher soap dispenser assembly. If detergent dispenser door does not open during the wash cycle, this part may need replacement.
